ERA-NET COFUND Project Support to Assoc. Prof. Mehmet Nafiz Aydın

We are pleased to announce that the project

“TOP4HoneyChains – Trustable and Sustainable Open Platform for Smart Honey Value Chains”,

coordinated by Assoc. Prof. Mehmet Nafiz Aydin is funded by the

ERA-NET COFUND (ICT-AGRI-FOOD)

program.

The main goal of TOP4HoneyChains is to develop a trustable and sustainable open platform that will enable the smart honey value chains in Türkiye and Argentina by leveraging a transnational approach with the Polish and Latvian partners. Our university will coordinate the 3-year project in a consortium of nine institutions in four countries to increase the effectiveness and efficiency of the traceability and transparency for achieving smart honey value chains as a whole honey-food system.

(KHAS Economics) and

(KHAS Electrical-Electronics Engineering) will participate in the project.

We congratulate Dr. Aydın and the faculty members, and wish them success.
